summary.original: Optimize CircleCI configuration for speed, reliability, and maintainability. Use when users ask to improve `.circleci/config.yml`, reduce CI runtime, tune caching/workspaces/parallelism, remove pipeline waste, or fix flaky pipeline behavior caused by configuration choices.
summary.zhCN: CircleCI 配置优化：Optimize CircleCI configuration for speed, reliability, and maintainability. Use…

description.original: Optimize CircleCI configuration for speed, reliability, and maintainability. Use when users ask to improve `.circleci/config.yml`, reduce CI runtime, tune caching/workspaces/parallelism, remove pipeline waste, or fix flaky pipeline behavior caused by configuration choices. Official skill document adapted by Agent-OPT as a dedicated bilingual Web skill studio with section navigation, full-text search, and sandboxed source rendering. No upstream executable scripts are executed.
description.zhCN: CircleCI 配置优化。Agent-OPT 将官方 SKILL.md 适配为独立 Web 技能工作室：支持章节导航、全文检索、中英对照元数据与只读源码呈现；不执行上游脚本，不访问外部账号。

evidence.note: Pinned path-addressed SKILL.md from the official repository snapshot with content SHA 63f8b7913a9a084c814a8246583bb137006ef750.
License evidence from the official repository path for this skill or its parent plugin manifest.

license.evidence: Primary-source license identifier MIT recorded from plugins/circleci/.codex-plugin/plugin.json. Agent-OPT stores a local review copy of SKILL.md for Web rendering and does not execute upstream scripts.

description.original: Open the full official skill document with structured sections.
description.zhCN: 以结构化章节打开完整官方技能文档。

description.original: Keyword search across the skill body with line-level excerpts.
description.zhCN: 在技能正文中做关键词检索并返回行级摘录。

description.original: Jump between markdown headings and inspect one section at a time.
description.zhCN: 在 Markdown 标题之间跳转，并按章节查看内容。

notes: In-process skill runtime reads only catalog/skill-bodies/<slug> files prepared at curation time.
Upstream scripts, if any, are not executed by Agent-OPT.
No network, credentials, or host filesystem access is granted to the skill body.
Official path-addressed skill with preserved source text and dedicated Web skill studio.
Marked verified after in-process core/scenario/error/web tests of the skill reader runtime for this body snapshot.
Chinese UI labels and summary reviewed; original SKILL.md body remains English source text.

tests.evidence: Skill body loaded from catalog/skill-bodies and outline/list tools returned structured sections.
Representative section open + keyword search returned line excerpts from the official body.
Empty query and unknown section id rejected with controlled validation errors.
SkillWorkspace route renders outline and can open a section through the invoke API.
Runtime only reads curated skill-body files; no network/commands/secrets granted.
